message:
feat: implement gt compact command for TTL-based wisp compaction (gt-7mqd.6)

Implements the core compaction algorithm from WISP-COMPACTION-POLICY.md:
- Non-closed wisps past TTL get promoted (stuck detection)
- Closed wisps past TTL get deleted (Dolt AS OF preserves history)
- Wisps with comments, references, or keep labels always promoted
- Configurable TTLs per wisp type via .beads-wisp/config/<rig>.json
- Supports --dry-run, --verbose, --json output modes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
